reasoning: XLK (Tech) -0.59% and XLF (Financials) -0.54% both down material premarket amounts. XLE flat at +0.16%. Classic risk-off rotation: the two largest SPY component sectors (tech ~30%, financials ~13%) selling while defensive (energy) holds. SPY only -0.15% shows these two leaders are underperforming the index — weakness concentrated in growth sectors. Breadth is therefore NARROW. Medium-high bearish confidence from dual sector selloff, moderated by premarket data (not RTH volumes yet) and SPY's relative resilience.
key_observations: XLK: -0.59% premarket. Tech sector selling hard into open.
XLF: -0.54% premarket. Financials following tech lower. Both >0.5% down = clear alignment.
XLE: +0.16% premarket. Energy flat-to-slightly-up, no rotation leadership (would need >0.5% for risk-on cover).
SPY: -0.15% premarket. Index lagging sector downside. Signals weakness is concentrated in XLK+XLF, not broad.
Overall rotation: RISK-OFF confirmed. Tech+Financials diverging lower while SPY holds suggests intra-day pressure likely.
